safe_candidate_changes.description: Drop idx_template_edges_head_relation and idx_template_edges_tail_relation from proof mode unless pushed-down template endpoint lookup is implemented. Current synthesized template endpoint lookup materializes then filters, so these indexes are not buying current default semantics.
safe_candidate_changes.safe_disposition: proven unnecessary for current code path; can be audit/debug/build-only if future endpoint lookup needs it
safe_candidate_changes.risk: low if query latency gates pass

safe_candidate_changes.description: Replace local template entity/edge/head/tail TEXT ids with compact per-template integer ordinals and reconstruct external ids at overlay time.
safe_candidate_changes.safe_disposition: derivable from content_template_id plus local ordinal/hash; debug local strings can sidecar
safe_candidate_changes.risk: medium: touches overlay identity/import resolution; duplicate identity fixtures must pass

safe_candidate_changes.description: Move verbose PathEvidence JSON arrays/metadata to materialized path_evidence_edges/files/symbols/tests or debug sidecar, keeping compact path headers in proof mode.
safe_candidate_changes.safe_disposition: derivable from materialized lookup tables and proof edges/spans; debug metadata can sidecar
safe_candidate_changes.risk: medium: context packet reader must reconstruct exactly

safe_candidate_changes.description: Replace repeated template metadata/provenance JSON with compact flags/defaults and optional debug sidecar.
safe_candidate_changes.safe_disposition: default metadata is derivable from schema; non-empty debug/provenance details can sidecar while preserving derived provenance fields
safe_candidate_changes.risk: low-medium: must preserve non-empty provenance/debug semantics

safe_candidate_changes.description: Split proof-visible symbol/qname-prefix dictionaries from template-only/debug display strings, or reconstruct qname prefixes from entity hierarchy where possible.
safe_candidate_changes.safe_disposition: proof lookup names remain; debug/template-only strings move to sidecar or become derivable
safe_candidate_changes.risk: medium-high: needs careful lookup compatibility and manual relation/context gates

safe_candidate_changes.description: Repeated entity/template content_hash is not a meaningful remaining lever in this artifact. The payload is already effectively zero in template_entities/entities.
safe_candidate_changes.safe_disposition: already solved; do not count this toward the 70 MiB plan

minimal_safe_package.notes: No data is removed in this phase. This package reaches the target by making template identity data compact/derivable, moving verbose PathEvidence JSON to normalized rows/sidecar, and removing currently-unused proof-mode indexes.
